
```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(dplyr)
library(PIPoL)

load("../Real_Data/ibd_16s_negative.RData")

otu_matrix <- as(physeq@otu_table, "matrix")
sample.names <- colnames(as.data.frame(otu_matrix))

NC <- ifelse(grepl("blank", sample.names, ignore.case = TRUE),
             "Control",
             "Biological")

metadata <- data.frame(sampleID = sample.names, NC = NC)
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$sampleID
metadata$sampleID <- NULL

sample_data(physeq) <- sample_data(metadata)
```

```{r}

decon_res <- decontamination(
  physeq = physeq,
  outcome_var = "NC",
  label = "Control",
  tau = "Genus",
  alpha = 0.05,
  gamma_weighted = 0.05,
  gamma_unweighted = 0.05
)

decon_res$plot

```


```{r}
enrich_res <- enrichment_prevalence(
  physeq = physeq,
  outcome_var = "NC",
  group = "Control",
  tau_level = "Genus",
  alpha = 0.05,
  min_prevalence = 0.05
)
enrich_res$plot_enrichment
enrich_res$plot_prev_enrich
enrich_res$plot_abund_enrich
enrich_res$plot_prev_abund

```
